ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the league */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "local_time" TEXT /* Local time of the game */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game is played */,
  "distance_from" REAL /* Distance traveled by the away team to the venue */,
  "time_since" REAL /* Time since the away team's last game (in hours) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "tv_views" INTEGER /* Number of TV viewers */,
  "online_views" INTEGER /* Number of online viewers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the venue's official website */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude for mapping */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude for mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, fan) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "local_time" TEXT /* Local time of the game */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game is played */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicator for whether the team is playing at home or away */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_itineraries" (
  "itinerary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel itinerary */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time of arrival */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., bus, plane) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled (in miles) */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number (if applicable) */,
  "bus_number" TEXT /* Bus number (if applicable) */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel where the team is staying */,
  "hotel_address" TEXT /* Address of the hotel */,
  "hotel_check_in" TEXT /* Check-in time at the hotel */,
  "hotel_check_out" TEXT /* Check-out time at the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("itinerary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_itineraries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_itineraries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game (e.g., 3-2) */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of goals allowed by the team */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the team */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties by the team */,
  "power_play_opportunities" INTEGER /* Number of power play opportunities */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won by the team */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost by the team */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the team */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the venue */,
  "tv_views" INTEGER /* Number of TV viewers */,
  "online_views" INTEGER /* Number of online viewers */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions */,
  "social_media_relays" INTEGER /* Number of social media relays (e.g., retweets, shares) */,
  "fan_rating" REAL /* Average fan rating of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view schedule) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., score, penalty, substitution) */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of the update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the update */,
  "period" TEXT /* Current period of the game */,
  "time_remaining" TEXT /* Time remaining in the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_updates_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots by the player */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won by the player */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., LW, RW, C, D, G) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position the player was drafted */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of officiating experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
